ranking.reason: No material loss versus gpt-5.5/xhigh; strongest wall-time and output/reasoning token profile among quality-equivalent candidates.
Baseline-quality anchor; higher output and reasoning tokens than gpt-5.5/low without material quality gain on this fixture.
Quality-equivalent, but its boundary note is less structured and telemetry is not better than gpt-5.5/low.
Prior primary remains quality-equivalent, but output is less directly machine-readable and measured output tokens/wall time were worse than gpt-5.5/low.

selection_rule: Only quality_equivalent_pass candidates are primary-eligible. Quality differences under five points were resolved by output/reasoning tokens, wall time, and machine-readability. Model price was not measured.
